errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

password.title: Password & Security
password.changePasswordDescription: Create a strong password to keep your account secure
password.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account

securityTips.unique: Use a unique password that you don't use elsewhere
securityTips.twoFactor: Enable two-factor authentication for extra security
securityTips.neverShare: Never share your password with anyone
securityTips.manager: Use a password manager to generate and store secure passwords

notifications.pushDescription: Manage how you receive notifications on your device
notifications.liveStreamSubtitle: Get notified when streamers you follow go live
notifications.followSubtitle: Get notified when someone follows you
notifications.commentSubtitle: Get notified about comments on your streams
notifications.infoMessage: You can always change these settings later. Some notifications may still be sent for security and account-related updates.
notifications.permissionMessage: We need notification permission to keep you updated. Please allow notifications.
notifications.permissionRequiredMessage: You need to allow notifications to continue.

streaming.chatInteractionDesc: Manage how viewers can interact with your streams
streaming.chatModerationDesc: Choose who can comment on your streams
streaming.chatModerationSubtitle: Who can comment on your streams

quality.mediumDesc: 720p - Good balance of quality and data

tips.autoQuality: Choose 'Auto' quality for the best viewer experience
tips.autoRecord: Enable auto-record to save your best moments
tips.followerChat: Use follower-only chat to reduce spam
tips.categoryMatch: Pick a category that matches your content for better discovery

privacy.profilePrivacyDesc: Control who can see your profile and content
privacy.profileVisibilityDesc: Choose who can see your profile
privacy.locationActivityDesc: Manage your location and online status visibility
privacy.locationSharingSubtitle: Share your location with other users
privacy.showOnlineStatusSubtitle: Let others see when you're online
privacy.communicationDesc: Control how others can interact with you
privacy.directMessagesSubtitle: Allow others to send you direct messages

visibility.friendsDesc: Only people you follow can see your profile
visibility.privateDesc: Only you can see your profile

tips.privateProfile: Keep your profile private if you want more control over who sees your content
tips.locationOff: Turn off location sharing if you don't want others to know where you are
tips.disableMessages: Disable direct messages if you're receiving unwanted messages
tips.reviewBlocked: Review your blocked users list regularly

blockedUsers.title: Blocked Users
blockedUsers.emptyDescription: You haven't blocked any users yet. When you block someone, they won't be able to see your profile or interact with you.
blockedUsers.blockedDescription: Blocked users can't see your profile, send you messages, or interact with your content.
blockedUsers.unblockConfirm: Are you sure you want to unblock {{name}}?
blockedUsers.unblockInfo: When you unblock someone, they'll be able to see your profile and interact with you again. They won't be notified that you've unblocked them.

email.currentEmailDesc: Your email address is used for account recovery and important notifications
email.verificationDesc: Verify your email to secure your account and receive important updates
email.verificationSentDesc: A verification code has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and enter the code below.
email.verificationFailed: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.
email.changeEmailDesc: Update your email address. You'll need to verify the new address.
email.changeSuccess: Email change request sent. Please check your new email for verification.
email.preferencesDesc: Manage what types of emails you receive

tips.recovery: Keep your email address up to date for account recovery
tips.verify: Verify your email to enable all security features
tips.privacy: We'll never share your email with third parties
tips.spam: Check your spam folder if you don't receive verification emails

onboarding.firstNameMinChars: First name must be at least 2 characters
onboarding.firstNameMinLength: First name must be at least 2 characters long.
onboarding.lastNameMinChars: Last name must be at least 2 characters
onboarding.lastNameMinLength: Last name must be at least 2 characters long.
onboarding.enterAgeToContinue: Please enter your age to continue.
onboarding.ageRestrictionDesc: VibeLive is only available to users 18 years of age or older. We apologize for any inconvenience.
onboarding.confirmAge18: Please confirm you are 18 or older to continue.
onboarding.confirm18Checkbox: I confirm that I am 18 years of age or older
onboarding.mustBe18Plus: You must be 18+ to access all VibeLive features
onboarding.mustBe18OrOlder: You must be 18 or older to join VibeLive
onboarding.selectInterestsSubtitle: Select your interests so we can show you the most relevant events and streams
onboarding.interestsRecommend: You've selected {{count}} interest{{count === 1 ? '' : 's'}}. We recommend selecting at least 3 interests for the best personalized content. Continue anyway?
onboarding.selectOneInterest: Select at least one interest to continue
onboarding.interestsDesc: Select at least one interest to personalize your VibeLive experience.
onboarding.notificationsBlockedDesc: You're missing out on hot events and breaking news! Enable notifications in your device settings to stay in the loop.
onboarding.skipNotificationsDesc:
You'll miss out on:
• Breaking: Hot events near you
• Live alerts when friends go live
• Last-minute invites to exclusive events

Are you sure?
onboarding.notificationPermissionMessage: VibeLive wants to send you notifications about hot events near you.
onboarding.locationSubtitle: We need your location to show you the hottest events and live streams in your area
onboarding.locationBenefit2: Connect with people in your area
onboarding.locationPrivacy: Your location is only used to show nearby content and is never shared with other users
onboarding.neverMissActionDesc: Get notified when something hot is happening near you
onboarding.fomoHotEvent: Hot Event Alert - 47 people just joined a party 0.3 miles away
onboarding.fomoLiveEvent: Sarah_NYC just went live at the rooftop bar you love
onboarding.fomoVipEvent: VIP invite to tonight's underground music event
onboarding.welcomeMessage: You're all set! Welcome to VibeLive
onboarding.customizePrefs: You can customize notification preferences anytime in settings
onboarding.signupFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
onboarding.missingInfoDesc: Some required information is missing. Please go back and complete all steps.
onboarding.accountInfoMissingDesc: Your account information is incomplete. Please restart the signup process.
onboarding.locationAccessDesc: VibeLive needs location access to show you nearby events and streams. Please enable location in your device settings.
onboarding.locationEnableOrSkip: Please enable location access or choose to skip this step to continue.
onboarding.skipLocationDesc: Without location access, you'll miss out on discovering hot events and streams happening right around you. Are you sure?

streaming.freeMinutesUp: Your free minutes are up this week.
streaming.freeMinutesReset: Free minutes reset every Monday. Get more now to keep going live.
streaming.streamEndingMessage: Your free stream will end in 3 minutes. Boost your stream to continue streaming unlimited!
streaming.playbackDescription: Since this is a boosted stream, viewers can watch the playback for up to 12 hours after it ends.
streaming.viewersCanWatch: ✅ Viewers will be able to watch your stream for 12 hours
streaming.streamUnavailable: ⚠️ Stream will be immediately unavailable after ending
streaming.endStreamWarning: This will end your stream for all viewers and cannot be undone
streaming.streamEndingGetMinutes: Your stream is ending. Get more minutes to go live again tonight.
streaming.freeMinutesResetNext: Free minutes reset every Monday. Next reset: {{nextReset}}
streaming.minutesNeverExpireInfo: Minutes never expire once purchased. Use them across any night out.

squad.needPreferencesDesc: At least one member should have picked their vibe before generating a recommendation.
squad.cancelSquadDesc: Are you sure? This will end the squad for everyone.
squad.shareHint: Friends don't need the app — just share the link
squad.startNowOrWait: You can start now or wait for someone to join
squad.perfectDuo: Perfect duo — find a spot you both love
squad.creator: Creator
squad.cancelledDesc: The squad creator cancelled this session.
squad.locationRequiredDesc: Enable location access to create a squad.
squad.squadModeDesc: Date night or group outing — one confident recommendation for everyone
squad.expiredBanner: Your last squad has ended. Start a fresh one for tonight!
squad.cancelledBanner: Squad was cancelled. Ready for a new one?

squad.noAppNeededDesc: Join right here — no download, no account. Just pick your preferences.
squad.pickYourVibeSubtitle: This helps us find the right spot for everyone
squad.yourNamePlaceholder: What should the squad call you?
squad.howImportantHint: If these are dealbreakers, we'll make sure the recommendation matches.
squad.noAccountHint: No account created. Your preferences are only used for tonight.

event.minutesNeverExpire: Minutes never expire. Go live whenever you're ready.

venueClaim.enterGoogleUrl: Please enter your Google Business Profile URL.
venueClaim.urlNotMatched: The URL could not be matched to this venue. Please check the URL and try again, or choose a different verification method.
venueClaim.enterSocialHandle: Please enter your social media handle.
venueClaim.pasteGoogleUrl: Paste your Google Business Profile URL below. We'll match it to
venueClaim.howToFindUrlSteps:
1. Go to business.google.com
2. Select your business
3. Copy the URL from your browser
venueClaim.addCodeToBio: Add the code below to your Instagram or TikTok bio, then we'll verify it automatically.
venueClaim.socialInstructions:
1. Copy the verification code above
2. Add it anywhere in your {{platform}} bio
3. Enter your handle and continue
4. We'll check your bio after you submit
venueClaim.provideBusinessLicense: Provide your business license or official document for manual review.
venueClaim.acceptedDocumentsList:
• Business license or registration
• Liquor license
• Food service permit
• Lease agreement with venue name
venueClaim.unclaimedDesc: This venue has not been claimed yet.
venueClaim.pendingVerificationDesc: Your evidence is being verified. This usually takes a few minutes.
venueClaim.underReviewDesc: Your claim is being reviewed by our admin team. This typically takes 1-2 business days.
venueClaim.approvedDesc: Your claim has been approved! Your venue is now onboarded.
venueClaim.rejectedDesc: Your claim was not approved. You may be able to resubmit with updated information.
venueClaim.suspendedDesc: This venue has been suspended. Contact support for more information.
venueClaim.evidenceNotMatch: The evidence provided does not match this venue.
venueClaim.notVerifiable: We were unable to verify your identity as a venue representative.
venueClaim.doesNotMeetCriteria: This venue does not meet our onboarding criteria.
venueClaim.duplicateClaim: Another claim for this venue is already being reviewed.
venueClaim.fraudulent: The submission was flagged as potentially fraudulent.
venueClaim.step1Desc: Google Business, social media, or business license upload.
venueClaim.step2Desc: Confirm you represent this venue through the chosen method.
venueClaim.step3Desc: Choose a tier — analytics, notifications, or premium.
venueClaim.step4Desc: Our team reviews and approves your claim. You'll get a 30-day free trial.
venueClaim.resubmitBanner: Your previous claim was rejected. You can resubmit with updated information.
venueClaim.verificationInProgressMsg: We're verifying your claim. This usually takes a few minutes for Google Business and social media verification. You'll receive a notification once it's reviewed.
venueClaim.underManualReviewMsg: Your claim has been submitted for manual review by our team. This typically takes 1-2 business days. We'll notify you as soon as a decision is made.
venueClaim.claimApprovedMsg: Congratulations! Your venue claim has been approved. Your 30-day free trial has started. You can now access your venue dashboard.
venueClaim.makeSureCodeInBio: Make sure the verification code is in your bio:
venueClaim.wellCheckBioAutomatically: We'll check your bio automatically. You have up to 5 verification attempts.
venueClaim.adminTeamReviews: Our admin team reviews your submission
venueClaim.youllReceiveNotification: You'll receive a push notification with the result
venueClaim.trialBeginsAutomatically: Once approved, your 30-day free trial begins automatically
venueClaim.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
venueClaim.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
venueClaim.disclaimer: By submitting, you confirm that you are authorized to represent this venue and that the information provided is accurate.
venueClaim.upgradeOrCancelAnytime: You can upgrade or cancel anytime.
venueClaim.analyticsDesc: See how your venue performs on VibeLive.
venueClaim.notificationsDesc: Engage your audience in real time.
venueClaim.howWouldYouLikeToProve: How would you like to prove you represent
venueClaim.googleBusinessDesc: Fastest method. Paste your Google Business Profile URL and we'll match it to the venue.
venueClaim.socialMediaDesc: Add a unique code to your Instagram or TikTok bio. We'll check it automatically.
venueClaim.businessLicenseDesc: Upload an official document like a business license, liquor license, or food service permit.
venueClaim.searchForYourVenue: Search for your venue to begin the claiming process.
venueClaim.typeAtLeastTwoChars: Type at least 2 characters to search.
venueClaim.areYouStreamingFromVenue: Are you streaming from a claimed venue? Tag it so viewers can discover the spot.
venueClaim.claimOnWeb: Claim Your Venue on the Web
venueClaim.webRedirectMessage: The venue claiming process has moved to our web platform for a better experience with document uploads and verification.
